final_prompt.prompt:
Create a documentary street photography image capturing the morning bathing ritual on the 恒河 in 瓦拉纳西, India (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a "纪实摄影" aesthetic — references in the spirit of Raghu Rai's intimate India documentary work, Magnum Photos street reportage tradition, 1970s–1980s National Geographic color field photography; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: 
Subject: must include devout pilgrims bathing in the 恒河, boats on the river, morning mist atmosphere
Scene/backdrop: must include the 恒河 riverbank at 瓦拉纳西 at dawn, with mist over the water and boats visible
Lighting/mood: needs a warm golden dawn atmosphere with morning mist — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a warm-toned direction with golden sunlight — exact hues and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default; must preserve the 异域文化 atmosphere of 瓦拉纳西 — pilgrims, river, boats, and morning mist all present
Avoid:
